response.overview: Grace, a terminally ill young woman burdened by the consequences of her reckless past, prepares to end her life. As guilt, temptation, and divine grace take shape in a haunting battle for her soul, she must confront her deepest regrets and decide whether redemption is still possible before time runs out.
response.tagline: A terminally ill young woman haunted by the consequences of her past must choose between surrendering to guilt or embracing redemption as unseen spiritual forces battle for her soul.
response.title: The Price of Becoming
